nasb.text: (Formerly in Israel, when a man went to inquire of God, he used to say, “Come, and let us go to the seer”; for he who is called a prophet now was formerly called a seer.)

esv.text: (Formerly in Israel, when a man went to inquire of God, he said, “Come, let us go to the seer,” for today’s “prophet” was formerly called a seer.)

cnv.text: 從前在以色列中，有人去求問　神的時候，就這樣說：“來，我們去見先見吧。”因為今天稱為先知的，從前稱為先見。

ccb.text: 从前在以色列，如果人们要求问上帝，他们会说：“让我们去找先见吧。”当时“先知”被称为“先见”。
